features.name: unused register with synchronous reset in module
features.description: Code should include a register declared and updated in an always block with synchronous reset but never connected to any module output or downstream logic, creating dead sequential state

features.name: always posedge block driving only dead registers
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clock) block whose body exclusively drives registers that are never read or connected to any output port, making the entire always block dead code

features.name: module with no output-driving logic and only dead internal state
features.description: Code should include a module that has clock and reset inputs but contains no output ports and all internal registers are dead, representing a fully dead module that a compiler should be able to eliminate
